roles.core: central bot, D1 authority, phased maintenance, payment callbacks, report outbox, safe update controller and Durable Object live usage engine
roles.edge: reseller bots, customer order/service UI, reseller web dashboard and PasarGuard service lifecycle
roles.processor: phased advanced schedules, auto-renewal, service health, reseller tiers, backups, campaigns and background reports

features: replaces the two-request error-center write with one atomic SQLite UPSERT that increments duplicate open errors
applies the same single-request UPSERT in Core rollout tracking and Processor background error recording
splits Core Cron maintenance into four rotating bounded phases instead of running every large job in one invocation
splits Processor business jobs into four rotating bounded phases and limits queue delivery concurrency and batch size
reduces report flush, repair, health-check, backup and version-activation batches that previously could exhaust one invocation
tries to configure a 50000 subrequest limit for Core, Edge and Processor on Workers Paid and safely ignores unsupported Free-plan responses
adds an optional Wrangler limits example while retaining the Durable Object migration configuration
keeps gift-plan Persian RTL fixes, service deletion, panel cache sync and all previous features

deployment.automatic_provisioning: upload the ZIP through the central bot; no manual D1 action is required
deployment.cron: existing schedules may remain; work is now rotated across four phases
deployment.subrequest_limit: best-effort PATCH to 50000 on paid plans plus code-level phased fallback for free plans
deployment.error_center_write: single INSERT ... ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE counter increment

limitations: production Cloudflare, Telegram and PasarGuard calls were not executed without account credentials
